symptom: All cuts freeze for last 30-50 percent of duration (e.g. S01 freezes 5s-8s). Hard cuts feel stuck.
root_cause: I2V generated ~5s then tpad clone extended to target duration without continuous motion. Mass clip approve without opening files.
fix: Ban freeze pad in Rule 7.3; v2 duration=10s full frame I2V; document intentional still only on outro.
prevention: Before assemble: probe that motion exists near end of each clip; never tpad=clone to fill duration; match duration_sec to generated length or split shots.
